property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\shrig\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0ViDyZB;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;H:\sonarqube-25.7.0.110598\bin;C:\app\shrig\product\21c\dbhomeXE\bin;C:\Users\shrig\Downloads\WINDOWS.X64_193000_db_home\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\apache-ant-1.10.15\bin;C:\Teraform;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\apache-maven\bin;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Kubernetes\Minikube;C:\terraform;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Memurai\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\elasticsearch\tools\elasticsearch-9.2.5\bin;;H:\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\shrig\.local\bin;c:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\codeBin;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Oracle\VirtualBox;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Links;H:\cursorIDE\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\shrig\AppData\Local\OpenAI\Codex\bin;C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\OpenAI.Codex_26.311.2262.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\app\resources;.
